    In all clauses derived during a proof, a particular constant is denoted by the same instance of this class.

    This class represents division.

    IntegerConstant
    All assumptions of Constant are valid for this class.

    The same instance of one variable exists for the same variable in the scope of one literal.

    Variable
    The same instance of one variable exists for the same variable in the scope of one clause.
    VariableContext
    This class is used to get new instances of Variable, Constant, LocalVariable and IntegerConstant.
    VariableTable
    Used by the loader to retrieve the instances of the variables, local variables and constants corresponding to the given index or name.
